Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Information We Collect

At GMEcodes, we collect minimal information to provide our services:

  • Account Data: Username and email address provided during registration.
  • Profile Data: Avatars and bios you choose to display.
  • Interaction Data: Comments and likes/dislikes on game codes.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your data is used solely to:

  • Maintain your user profile and comment history.
  • Improve site functionality and user experience.
  • Prevent spam and maintain a safe community environment.

3. Data Storage (Supabase)

We use Supabase for secure data storage. Your passwords are encrypted, and your email is kept private unless you choose to share it.

4. Cookies

We use local storage and cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences across sessions.

5. Contact Us

If you have questions about this policy, please reach out via our Contact Page.

About this site

  • Contact
  • Privacy Policy
  • About Us
